name: giuseppe_orellana_portfolio
description: A personal portfolio website for **Giuseppe Orellana**, a Senior Product Designer based in London. The site presents a hero introduction, a curated list of selected case studies, an about page, four long-form case studies, a styled 404 page, and a mechanical page loader. The aesthetic is **functional brutalism**: a monochrome + sans content system, a visible "ledger" grid, sharp corners, hairline borders instead of shadows, and a single desaturated-olive accent.
